backends.gpu_coverage: 0/2 GPU stages active on current host
backends.notes: Plonky3 STARK backend with native field profiles: Goldilocks/BabyBear over FRI and Mersenne31 over Circle PCS. Supports Equal/Boolean constraints, range constraints via bit decomposition (field-safe bit cap), and division via derived quotient columns. implementation_type=native compiled_in=true production_ready=true assurance_lane=native-cryptographic-proof proof_semantics=proof-enforced-lowered-ir aggregation_semantics=single-proof-with-optional-wrapper

backends.gpu_coverage: 0/2 GPU stages active on current host
backends.notes: Plonkish backend implemented with Halo2 (IPA). Supports Equal/Boolean/Range/Div. Range constraints wider than 16 bits are lowered into 16-bit lookup chunks automatically. implementation_type=native compiled_in=true production_ready=true assurance_lane=native-cryptographic-proof proof_semantics=proof-enforced-basic-ir aggregation_semantics=single-proof-only

backends.gpu_coverage: 0/1 GPU stages active on current host
backends.notes: Native Nova backend (nova-snark) with IR-backed step circuit and classic/hypernova profiles. Compatibility delegation is disabled by default and can be enabled only with ZKF_NOVA_ALLOW_COMPAT_DELEGATE=true. implementation_type=native compiled_in=true production_ready=true assurance_lane=native-cryptographic-proof proof_semantics=proof-enforced-basic-ir-recursive-shell aggregation_semantics=cryptographic-recursive-folding

backends.gpu_coverage: 0/0 GPU stages active on current host
backends.notes: Midnight runtime: proves via proof server when ZKF_MIDNIGHT_PROOF_SERVER_PROVE_URL is set; otherwise delegates to arkworks-groth16 when ZKF_MIDNIGHT_ALLOW_COMPAT_DELEGATE=true. Shipped developer-platform commands include `zkf midnight gateway serve`, `zkf midnight templates`, `zkf midnight init`, `zkf midnight doctor`, `zkf midnight disclosure`, and `zkf midnight resolve`, pinned to compactc 0.30.0, but they do not promote this backend row to production-ready. implementation_type=native compiled_in=true production_ready=false assurance_lane=delegated-or-external-lane proof_semantics=external-or-delegated aggregation_semantics=single-proof-only readiness_reason=midnight-proof-server-unconfigured operator_action=configure real http(s) ZKF_MIDNIGHT_PROOF_SERVER_PROVE_URL and ZKF_MIDNIGHT_PROOF_SERVER_VERIFY_URL endpoints and ensure GET /health succeeds
